content.intro: The TDS integration allows PropertyGoose to register deposits with the Tenancy Deposit Scheme automatically and generate prescribed information certificates for tenants.

steps.title: Go to Settings → Deposits → TDS Integration
steps.content: Navigate to Settings, open the Deposits section, and find the TDS Integration panel.

steps.title: Enter Your TDS Credentials
steps.content: Enter your TDS agent account number and API credentials. These are available from your TDS member portal.

steps.title: Save and Test the Connection
steps.content: Click Save and then test the connection to verify your credentials are working correctly with the TDS API.

steps.title: Select TDS When Creating Initial Monies
steps.content: When setting up initial monies for a tenancy, select TDS as the deposit scheme from the deposit protection dropdown.

steps.title: PropertyGoose Registers the Deposit
steps.content: PropertyGoose automatically registers the deposit with TDS on your behalf using the credentials you provided.

steps.title: Deposit Protection Certificate Generated
steps.content: Once registered, a deposit protection certificate is generated and can be sent to tenants as part of the compliance pack.

sections.title: 30-Day Protection Deadline
sections.content: You must protect a deposit within 30 days of receiving it and provide tenants with the prescribed information. PropertyGoose will display a reminder if a deposit remains unprotected beyond this window.
